attributes.description: Alerts when `threads_running / threads_connected > 0.9` with at least 5 threads connected. Indicates CPU-bound workload.
attributes.name: [MySQL OTel] Thread saturation

investigation_guide.blob:
## MySQL thread saturation

### What fired
Running threads over connected threads exceeded 90% with at least 5 connections.

### Why it matters
When nearly all connections are actively executing, MySQL is CPU-bound. Query throughput stalls and queues form.

### Triage
1. Inspect top SQL by CPU.
2. Look at InnoDB concurrency settings.

### Remediation
- Tune `innodb_thread_concurrency` / add CPU.
- Optimise heavy queries.

### Tuning
- 0.9 threshold; 5 connections minimum avoids noise.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-mysqlreceiver.otel-*
// Threads are gauges; pivot running vs connected by instance
| WHERE metrics.mysql.threads IS NOT NULL
    AND attributes.kind IN ("running", "connected")
| STATS
    running = MAX(metrics.mysql.threads) WHERE attributes.kind == "running",
    connected = MAX(metrics.mysql.threads) WHERE attributes.kind == "connected"
  BY resource.attributes.mysql.instance.endpoint
// Saturation = running threads close to connected (CPU-bound workload)
| EVAL ratio = CASE(connected > 0, running / connected, 0)
// Alert when ratio > 0.9 and we have meaningful thread count; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE ratio > 0.9 AND connected >= 5
| SORT ratio DESC
